---
id: handle-portal
title: "Get customer portal URL"
description: "Generates a Polar Customer Portal URL for the authenticated user. The frontend should redirect the user to the returned URL to manage their subscription, payment methods, and invoices"
sidebar_label: "Get customer portal URL"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get customer portal URL"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/billing/portal"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Generates a Polar Customer Portal URL for the authenticated user. The frontend should redirect the user to the returned URL to manage their subscription, payment methods, and invoices
